% ================================================================
% TABLE: PASS-THROUGH DIFF-IN-DIFF, FOUR COLUMNS
% ================================================================
%
% Numbers from output_local/tables/phase4_ppi_did_2017.csv, generated by
% analysis/phase4_ppi_did_2017.R. Coefficients are from the regression
%   log P_{s,m} = beta * X_s * 1{year(m) >= 2017} + alpha_s + delta_m + eps,
% with X_s ∈ {Treated_s, omega^em_s, omega^sh_s} and the post-2017 indicator
% replaced by 1{year >= 2017}. SEs clustered on NACE 4d.
%
% Columns:
%   (A) Treated x Post                — 2010m1–2022m12
%   (B) omega^em x Post               — 2010m1–2022m12
%   (C-2019) omega^sh x Post          — 2010m1–2019m12
%   (C-2022) omega^sh x Post          — 2010m1–2022m12
% ----------------------------------------------------------------

\begin{table}[H]
    \centering
    \caption{Differential post-2017 producer-price response by pre-2017 ETS exposure measure. Each column reports the coefficient $\hat\beta$ from \eqref{eq:did_2017}: log-PPI on $X_s \cdot \mathbf{1}\{\text{year}(m) \geq 2017\}$, with NACE 4-digit and year-month fixed effects, on a monthly panel of Belgian NACE 4-digit producer prices. Standard errors clustered at the NACE 4-digit level in parentheses. Stars: $^{*}\,p<0.10$, $^{**}\,p<0.05$, $^{***}\,p<0.01$.}
    \label{tab:passthrough_did}
    \begin{tabular}{lcccc}
        \toprule
                                    & (A)              & (B)             & (C)              & (C)              \\
        Exposure measure $X_s$      & Treated$_s$      & $\omega^{em}_s$ & $\omega^{sh}_s$  & $\omega^{sh}_s$  \\
        Sample window               & 2010m1--2022m12  & 2010m1--2022m12 & 2010m1--2019m12  & 2010m1--2022m12  \\
        \midrule
        $\hat\beta$ \,($X_s \times \text{Post}$)
                                    & $0.026$          & $13.02$         & $166.61^{**}$    & $309.59^{***}$   \\
                                    & $(0.017)$        & $(20.41)$       & $(65.81)$        & $(94.17)$        \\
        \midrule
        Observations                & $21{,}192$       & $21{,}192$      & $16{,}260$       & $21{,}192$       \\
        NACE 4d sectors             & 136              & 136             & 136              & 136              \\
        Sector FE                   & \checkmark       & \checkmark      & \checkmark       & \checkmark       \\
        Year-month FE               & \checkmark       & \checkmark      & \checkmark       & \checkmark       \\
        \bottomrule
    \end{tabular}
\end{table}
